summary: Good-quality recording of Keith & Donna Godchaux's final show, noted for its historic significance.
review: The lone review gives this release four stars and points out that it captures the last performance featuring Keith and Donna Godchaux. No specific remarks are made about sound clarity or musical execution, but the positive rating indicates a generally satisfying listening experience despite the lack of detailed feedback.
